resources.string: Detects when you open a chosen app and shows a timed pause before you continue.
Pause uses Android\'s accessibility service to notice when you open one of your chosen apps, so it can show the pause screen before you continue.
Pause may be stopped in the background

Phones sometimes close apps running in the background to save power, which stops Pause from working until you turn accessibility off and on again.\n\nTap Allow to let Pause keep running. On some phones you should also turn off battery optimization or \"put app to sleep\" for Pause in the system settings.

Phones sometimes close apps running in the background, which stops Pause until you turn accessibility off and on again.

1. Tap Allow to let Pause keep running.
2. Open Settings, Battery, Background usage limits.
3. Add Pause to "Never sleeping apps", and make sure it is not under Sleeping or Deep sleeping apps.

Phones sometimes close apps running in the background, which stops Pause until you turn accessibility off and on again.

1. Tap Allow to let Pause keep running.
2. In the app settings, set Battery saver to "No restrictions".
3. Turn on Autostart for Pause.

Phones sometimes close apps running in the background, which stops Pause until you turn accessibility off and on again.

1. Tap Allow to let Pause keep running.
2. In the app settings, allow Auto-launch and background running for Pause.
3. Turn off battery optimization for Pause.

Phones sometimes close apps running in the background, which stops Pause until you turn accessibility off and on again.

1. Tap Allow to let Pause keep running.
2. Allow Autostart and background running for Pause.
3. Set high background power consumption to allowed for Pause.

Phones sometimes close apps running in the background, which stops Pause until you turn accessibility off and on again.

1. Tap Allow to let Pause keep running.
2. In the app settings, set Pause to Manage manually.
3. Turn on Auto-launch, Secondary launch, and Run in background.
How long the pause screen stays before you can continue. The “Open anyway” button only appears once this time is up.
After you tap “Open anyway”, Pause won\'t interrupt opening that app for this many minutes. Applies to that one app only. Pause never closes an app while you\'re using it.
Last opened %1$s ago, tried once in the last 24h
Last opened %1$s ago, tried %2$d times in the last 24h
No pauses yet. They\'ll show up here once you open a paused app.
